verse_text: A wicked and adulterous generation seeks after a sign, and no sign shall be given to it except the sign of the prophet a Jonah.' And He left them and departed.

links.context: Three days and three nights is a prophetic type of Christ's three-day sojourn in the "heart of the earth [Sheol]" ([[MAT.12:40]]; see also [[MAT.16:4]]; [[1PE.3:19]]: "He [Jesus] went and preached to the spirits in prison [Sheol or Gr. Hades]").
